授業目的: The purpose of this course is for students to learn the academic writing process and develop their writing through the completion of a descriptive 5 paragraph essay.
到達目標: Students will be able to … • Develop organized and structured writing • Create New, Interesting, Specific writing • Write effective topic sentences and thesis statements • Write well-developed body paragraphs supported with examples and explanations • Plan and write different essay types • Reflect on your own writing and provide peer feedback • Paraphrase, summarize information • Cite and reference sources, APA style
授業の概要・背景:
• Develop freewriting skills through blogs
• Learn and practice writing through mini workshops
• Exchange and develop ideas with classmates
• Create a five paragraph “descriptive” essay
授業方法: This course will use a variety of learning activities ranging from lectures, discussions, presentations, pair work, and group work.

第1回: 【Startup Week】 Online Class (On-demand format and/or Task-oriented format)《90minutes 》
第2回: 【Core Weeks①】Paragraph Writing & Concrete Support "Face-to-face class"《90minutes 》
第3回: 【Core Weeks②】Writing Guidelines "Face-to-face class"《90minutes 》
第4回: 【Core Weeks③】Transition Words "Face-to-face class"《90minutes 》
第5回: 【Core Weeks④】Graph Descriptions "Face-to-face class"《90minutes 》
第6回: 【Core Weeks⑤】Research & Citations "Face-to-face class"《90minutes 》
第8回: 【Core Weeks⑦】Paper Introductions & Conclusions "Face-to-face class"《90minutes 》
第9回: 【Core Weeks⑧】Body Paragraphs "Face-to-face class"《90minutes 》
第10回: 【Core Weeks⑨】Writing Day I "Face-to-face class"《90minutes 》
第11回: 【Core Weeks⑩】Writing Day II "Face-to-face class"《90minutes 》
第12回: 【Core Weeks⑪】Writing Day III "Face-to-face class"《90minutes 》
第13回: 【Core Weeks⑫】Editing and Feedback "Face-to-face class"《90minutes 》
第14回: 【Flex Hours】Online class (On-demand format and/or Task-oriented format)《90minutes》
第15回: 【Classes and Examination Period】Final Examination (Face-to-face class)《90minutes》
トピック.授業計画1: The semester will focus on the development of a five paragraph, cause/effect essay.
トピック.授業外学習2: Homework will consist of writing tasks and essay development.

学位授与の方針との関連Relationship to Diploma Polic: Each course is positioned within the curriculum in accordance with the diploma policy and curriculum policy established by each undergraduate/graduate school. By proceeding with the study of this course with an awareness of the DP and CP, the following abilities expected by each undergraduate/graduate school will be developed.Language:1. Language Communication Skills: the ability to actively express oneself by utilizing the language proficiency.2. Intercultural Understanding and Multicultural Coexistence: the ability to be sensitive to different cultures and to coexist with diverse culture.
成績評価Grading0: 評価基準等　Grading Criteria etc.
成績評価Grading1: 50% Essay #1  20% Presentation  30% Coursework (ideas, outlines, drafts, edits, etc.)
